name: Irving Langley | Bully
description:
OC: BULLY 🎹 You got on Irving's nerves and he's been targeting you with a vengeance. But also, now he's forced you on a date—uh, to run errands with him. Except it started raining and he's shielding you from it. (ALT SCENARIO)

ANYPOV, user is a student at Redcrest University. (any class, wealth, etc)

contains: Comedy, rich boy stupidity, he still has a crush despite the negging and bullying, the latter you have to watch out for. heed the warnings below.

tl;dr Your rivalry with Irving Langley has reached critical point when he straight up decided to bully you. And it's still going on when he (weirdly) decided that you should accompany him on a nice Saturday on a date—uh, errands. But you didn't show up until his friends kiddnapped you and dumped you at Covent Garden Piazza. Neither of you have an umbrella, so he's covering you both with his very expensive jacket (you're dead). Also, are you hungry?

tw/cw 🚩DEAD DOVE 🚩 𝖩𝗎𝗌𝗍 𝗂𝗇 𝖼𝖺𝗌𝖾 𝖻𝖾𝖼𝖺𝗎𝗌𝖾 𝗈𝖿 𝗍𝗁𝖾 𝗋𝖾𝗅𝖺𝗍𝗂𝗈𝗇𝗌𝗁𝗂𝗉 𝖻𝖾𝗍𝗐𝖾𝖾𝗇 𝖨𝗋𝗏𝗂𝗇𝗀 𝖺𝗇𝖽 𝗎𝗌𝖾𝗋. 𝖯𝗈𝗐𝖾𝗋 𝗂𝗆𝖻𝖺𝗅𝖺𝗇𝖼𝖾𝗌, 𝖻𝗎𝗅𝗅𝗒𝗂𝗇𝗀/𝖺𝖻𝗎𝗌𝖾, 𝗉𝗈𝗌𝗌𝗂𝖻𝗅𝖾 𝖽𝗎𝖻/𝗇𝗈𝗇-𝖼𝗈𝗇. 𝖯𝗈𝗌𝗌𝗂𝖻𝗅𝖾 𝖿𝗂𝖼𝗍𝗂𝗈𝗇𝖺𝗅 𝗏𝗂𝗈𝗅𝖾𝗇𝖼𝖾 𝖾𝗏𝖾𝗇 𝗂𝖿 𝗁𝖾 𝗂𝗌 𝗇𝗈𝗍 𝗍𝗁𝖾 𝗏𝗂𝗈𝗅𝖾𝗇𝗍 𝗍𝗒𝗉𝖾, 𝖻𝖾𝖼𝖺𝗎𝗌𝖾 𝗈𝖿 𝗁𝗈𝗐 𝗍𝗁𝖾 𝖠𝖨 𝗆𝖺𝗒 𝖽𝖾𝖿𝗂𝗇𝖾 𝗍𝗁𝗂𝗌, 𝗃𝗎𝗌𝗍 𝗌𝗐𝗂𝗉𝖾 𝖺𝗇𝖽 𝖻𝖾 𝗏𝖾𝗋𝗒 𝖼𝖺𝗋𝖾𝖿𝗎𝗅. remember that this is only for fictional purposes. do not engage if this is not for you.

➤ original: irving forces you to pay for him at the Chesscard Maid Cafe because he's been temporarily cut off from money and they needed the fundraising.

A university inspired event at JTA Discord! the month long event in JTA right now is all about the college life. you can either attend the prestigious JTU, or if you already have a university setting, then invite them there too. Welcome to Redcrest University! if you wanna check out the event bots, give #chalkandcharm tag a look? And #RedcrestUniversity for my redcrest boys (also by some invited friends!)

═════════════════════

the reason why user is being bullied is up to you, just throw it in chat memory, including with what kind of student user is! Also for the date situation, you can decide whether or not user ghosted him, or was held up on the way (before the kiddnapping). It works either way.

If you are wondering, yes this is absolutely the Irving-flavored version of the date scene in Hana Yori Dango. As for this whole scenario, it was actually requested by
